curation_notes: Patch commit cc5b4f8 fixes the double free in DDGifSlurp (decoding.c) by adding an early return when newRasterSize is 0, freeing the buffer and setting the pointer to NULL. Only 1 source file changed. The pre-assigned class use-after-free (from CWE-415 Double Free) is correct — a double free is a specific form of use-after-free where freed memory is freed again. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern; reallocarray on rasterBits only appears in decoding.c.
